title: Nested XML Structure Generation
scenario: Generate a nested XML structure representing a family tree, including relatives, spouses, and children. The structure should use a specific schema and naming conventions. The XML should be well-formed and valid against the schema.
constraints: Must use a specific schema and naming conventions
Must include relatives, spouses, and children
Must be well-formed and valid against the schema

evaluationCriteria.description: The XML is syntactically correct and uses proper XML syntax.
The XML adheres to the specified schema and naming conventions.
The XML correctly represents the family tree structure with relatives, spouses, and children.
